beat.title: Shattering the obsidian
beat.boundaryReason: The group strikes the flaw, destroys the obsidian crystal, watches the fort calm, and settles on resting in the temple before the session closes out.
dateEvidence: the party decides to camp in the temple after destroying the crystal
the wrap-up includes the fort feeling calm through the night and into the next morning
